2606.06420.title: A Komi-Yazva--Russian Parallel Corpus and Evaluation Protocol for Zero- and Few-Shot LLM Translation
2606.06420.paper_summary: We present the first Komi-Yazva--Russian parallel corpus together with an explicit evaluation protocol for studying LLM translation in an endangered, extremely low-resource setting. The dataset contains 457 aligned sentence pairs from 74 narrative texts and is accompanied by documented provenance, sentence-level alignment, and story identifiers that enable leakage-aware evaluation. We use this setup to compare modern large language models on Komi-Yazva-to-Russian translation under severe parallel-data scarcity in zero-shot and retrieval-based few-shot regimes. The protocol includes story-level cross-validation, deterministic retrieval for few-shot prompting, strict validation of generated outputs, complementary reference-based and judge-based metrics, and story-level uncertainty estimates. Across models, LLMs produce non-trivial translations, but performance varies strongly by model family and prompting regime. Retrieval-based few-shot prompting consistently improves over zero-shot prompting, while gains beyond a small retrieved context remain limited. The results show that evaluative conclusions in this setting depend materially on metric choice and failure handling, so the paper frames the corpus as both a dataset contribution and a reproducible evaluation testbed for endangered-language machine translation.
2606.06420.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了第一個Komi-Yazva--俄語平行語料庫，並提供了一個明確的評估協議，用於研究在瀕危、極低資源環境下的LLM翻譯。該數據集包含來自74個敘事文本的457對對齊句子，並附有文獻來源、句子級對齊和故事標識符，這些都能支持對洩漏的敏感評估。我們利用這一設置在零樣本和基於檢索的少樣本模式下，對Komi-Yazva到俄語的翻譯進行現代大型語言模型的比較，面對嚴重的平行數據稀缺。該協議包括故事級交叉驗證、針對少樣本提示的確定性檢索、對生成輸出的嚴格驗證、補充的基於參考和基於評審的指標，以及故事級的不確定性估計。在各模型中，LLM生成了非平凡的翻譯，但性能在模型家族和提示模式之間存在顯著差異。基於檢索的少樣本提示在零樣本提示上始終有所提升，而超出小範圍檢索上下文的增益仍然有限。結果顯示，在這一環境下的評估結論在很大程度上依賴於指標選擇和失敗處理，因此本文將該語料庫框架視為數據集貢獻和可重複的評估測試平台，用於瀕危語言的機器翻譯。
2606.06420.author: Petr Parshakov et.al.
